summary: Comprehensive testing completed for WindailyBud productivity and wellness app. All core features tested successfully including authentication, todo management with Eisenhower Matrix, daily habits with 7 categories, and analytics.

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby for accessibility in modal dialogs
affected_selectors: DialogContent components in todo and habit creation

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in analytics due to container sizing

passed_tests: JWT authentication with proper token handling
Todo CRUD operations with urgency/importance tiers
Eisenhower Matrix view with correct quadrant placement
Daily habits with 7 categories (Supplementation, Physical, Brain, Lung, Mental, Social, Learning)
Custom habit creation with category selection
Analytics with category scores and overall score
Logout functionality returning to auth page
Dark theme UI with proper contrast

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor accessibility and chart warnings)
